name: lineage-extractor
description: CSA Loom lineage-extractor (loom-next-level WS-L, L3). A scheduled in-VNet Container App Job (one-shot per execution on LINEAGE_EXTRACTOR_CRON) that derives column-level lineage from completed ADF / Synapse Copy-activity `translator.mappings` and UPSERTs it into the Loom thread-edges column model (confidence 'declared'/'derived'). Managed-identity auth, no keys. NOT a Y1 Function — this estate's Linux Consumption plan cannot reach its AAD-only storage data-plane, so the ACA-job pattern (synthetic-monitor-job.bicep) is used.
